title: argemone arenicola
intro: Argemone arenicola, also known as Mexican prickly poppy, is a plant species that belongs to the poppy family (Papaveraceae) and is native to Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Argemone arenicola include pain relief, wound healing, and the treatment of respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the plant's seeds, leaves, and roots are used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes.
